reviews.raw_text: One of the worst shopping experiences with Amazon UAE. I ordered Nike shoes during a special offer. The rider called at 10:30 PM, and I told him I was at work. He marked the order as delivered without giving me the parcel. The next day, he asked me to collect it, but after making me wait 20 minutes, he said he didn't know where it was. Later, Amazon marked it as returned and issued a refund without my request. I wanted my shoes, not a refund. Very disappointing service.i not recommend Amazon UAE

Used to be great, but now it seems Amazon just doesn't care. Packages run late all the time now. There is a reason we select a delivery date. If it's going to be late a few days why even have us select what date we want our packages? Plus it's not like they say "Hey, sorry your package is delayed, this is how we will make up for it."
Lags ALL THE TIME! So frustrating!!
frozen all the time trash

app switch language on its own, and it can't be switched back

Amazon Dubai has become very poor in service. Either the orders are never delivered or are delivered at the wrong address or are damaged upon arrival (I have a lot of proof). The delivery drivers just throw the items at the door. Most of the time there is no photo proof of delivery. They never message or call when delivering the items. So many times the items sent have been wrong. And a few times the order has just been misplaced off late. Amazon has become very unreliable!
Forcing the "Alexa AI search" is annoying as hell. Let me search it like you had it before! If it ain't broke don't fix it!

Android Amazon App UI bug Subject: Android App UI Bug - "See More" link resets scroll position to the topApp Version: Android (Latest)Description: When reading long text blocks (such as item descriptions or customer reviews) and tapping the "See More" link to expand the text, the app does not show the expanded content. Instead, the page immediately jumps and resets the scroll position to the very top of the page. This forces the user to manually scroll back down and locate the section again.

فلوسك بتضيع لو أستخدمت هذا الموقع: أشتريت من الموقع منتج و تم ارسال بدلا منه منتج اخر تماما شئ ليس له صله بالمنتج الذي دفعت فيه و طبعا لانك تستلم عبوه مغلقه تكتشف ان نقودك قد ضاعت بعد فتح الكرتونه 
طبعا عملت مرتجع و حضر احد المندوبين و استرد الشيء الذي ارسلوه بالخطأ ، هذه هي البدايه فقط و ليست النهايه 
ثلاثه اشهر من تليفونات لخدمه العملاء و ملء اوراق و اثبات شخصيه و صور و ابلكيشن و اخيرا المنتج المسترد ضاع في الطريق تواصل مره اخري مع خدمه العملاء بعد كل هذا و ابدأ من البدايه 
نقودك صاعت او نضيع وقتك اختر احدهما
reviews.claude_summary: User experienced severe friction during a return flow, including tedious identity verification and photo uploads.

reviews.raw_text: Random ID verification after account was locked after making a purchase. I can't get a refund or access the account. I've done nothing wrong. Now the verification process wont accept my ID. why not do verification upon creation of account instead of robbing me blind.
reviews.claude_summary: ID verification rejects user's ID after account lock, preventing refund and account access.

reviews.raw_text: Always think twice before ordering and never pay online: I ordered some cleaning products and they canceled the order without notice or refund. It took me 3 calls with very incompetent persons just to issue the refund! Whether the refund will take place or not is something in the unknown.
reviews.claude_summary: User complains about a painful return process involving identity verification, photos, and lost items.

reviews.raw_text: إدارة سيئة مفيش أي زوق يعني إيه أشتري طلبات تتلغي ويطلبوا مني صورة الهوية؟ لا والسبب نشاط غير معتاد!! يعني اشتري أوردرات منكم مختلفة كأي شخص بيشتري حاجات متنوعة وتقولولي نشاط غير معتاد، كلام غير منطقي بالمرة واستهتار وقلة إحترام بعقول العملاء أنا في غنى عن إني أتعامل مع مؤسسة غير أمينة بالمرة بالشكل دا.

reviews.raw_text: التطبيق له عشر ايام مايفتح ويلغي الطلبيات اللي اطلبهم وماحد تواصل معي لفتح التطبيق وكل خدمه عملاءهم فشله ماحد يعرف يحل المشكله وقسم الإدارة تبعهم له عشر ايام مافتح التطبيق متعذرا بأعذار واهيه صار تطبيق امازون أسوأ تطبيق الكتروني وأسوأ متجر الكتروني لو كان في اقل من نجمه لعملتها..حتى هويتي الاماراتيه رسلتها لهم لإثبات ان الحساب لي .. مافي مصداقيه ابدا ومافي اهتمام بزباءنهم ابدا لايستحق اي نجمه على الإطلاق.. تطبيق امازون اخيس تطبيق الكتروني وأسوأ متجر الكتروني
